citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Investigate imbalances in training data in terms of gender, age, ethnicity, or other demographic variables that could result in a biased model, by using a data visualization tool.
